title: Culpitt Cake Board, Cake Drum, Silver, 9 Inch (228mm) Round, 0.5 Inch (13mm) Thick, (Pack of 5 Boards)
features: QUALITY CAKE BOARD: Sometimes referred to as a Cake Drum, this is the strongest type of Cake Board; It has a bonded fibre board inner which is covered on the top and sides with a fern textured, silver coloured foil and with white paper on the base

STURDY: This pack of 5, 12mm thick, 9" Round Silver Cake Drum Boards are ideal for presenting your cakes upon; Strong enough to support any type of cake, from a heavy fruit cake to a lighter sponge cake. Shrink wrapped together for hygiene.
RE-USEABLE: Covered in silver foil, these cake boards can be re-used over and over again after cleaning (with care).
CAKE SIZE GUIDE: As a general rule, a 9" drum is perfect for a 6" fruit cake, and a 7" sponge cake

SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASSIONS: A silver cake board is suitable for birthdays, anniversaries, parties weddings and all celebrations; A multipack of 5 cake boards is an ideal choice for regular cake makers and decorators
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt Ltd Established in 1921, Culpitt has been providing cake decorations for nearly 100 years. Culpitt are based in Northumberland and are the UK’s leading manufacturer of Cake Boards, Cake Boxes, Sugar Decorations, Fondant, and Edibles. Culpitt Cake Boards Sometimes referred to as a Cake Drum, this is the strongest type of Cake Board and is ideal for presenting your celebration bakes upon. It has a bonded fibre board inner which is covered on the top and sides with a fern textured, silver coloured foil and with white paper on the base. This bulk pack of 5 is perfect for regular bakers making for parties, birthdays, weddings, and events. These Cake Boards are supplied shrink wrapped in 5s, the Cake Boards are not individually wrapped. The finished Cake Board is 0.5" (13mm) thick. Ideal for large cakes like wedding cakes, celebration cakes, or extra special Birthday cakes! Fern textured silver foil with white paper on the base with a bonded fibre board inner. Manufactured in the UK. Perfect for all types of celebration This white box and silver square cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. A Silver cake board is great for birthdays, anniversaries, christmas, parties, weddings and all celebrations; A multipack of 5 cake boards is an ideal choice for regular cake makers, bakers, and decorators. Pack of 5 individually wrapped drum boards are ideal for presenting your cakes upon. Measuring 13mm in thickness, they are strong enough to support any type of cake, from a heavy fruit cake to a lighter sponge cake. This oblong white box and silver cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. Turn plain cakes into bright, eye-catching creations with Colour Splash Food Colouring Gels. Wide range of superb food colours including blue and pink food colouring.
